title: Global Surface Temperature
overview: Annual global mean temperature anomalies from GISTEMP and GCAG data sources, covering the period from 1880 to present.
usage_code:
import pandas as pd
url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/global-temp/main/data/annual.csv'
df = pd.read_csv(url)
df_gcag = df[df.Source == 'GCAG']
print(df_gcag.tail())
